hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; export GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0=submodule.recurse GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0=false; failed=''; npm run lint >&2 || failed="$failed lint"; npm run typecheck >&2 || failed="$failed typecheck"; npm run test:ts >&2 || failed="$failed test:ts"; mkdir -p firmware/build && make -C firmware test >&2 || failed="$failed firmware-test"; npm run codegen >&2 && git add firmware/src/cca/cca_generated.h firmware/src/ccx/ccx_generated.h 2>/dev/null; if [ -n "$failed" ]; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"CI failed:%s — fix these before committing."}' "$failed"; fi; }
